rulings.Calendar Matter: HEARING FOR PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD
rulings.Rulings: MOTION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD GRANTED - RESPONDENT FAILS TO ESTABLISH DENIAL OF CONTINUANCE REQUEST BY ARBITRATOR CAUSED SUBSTANTIAL PREJUDICE. RESPONDENT FAILS TO INTRODUCE EVIDENCE SHOWING WITNESS MAGPANTAY FAILURE TO TESTIFY WAS CAUSED BY ARBITRATOR. (JH)

rulings.Case Title: PRESERVATION PROPERTIES VS BELLUCCI
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION Motion To Tax Costs
rulings.Rulings: GRANT AS TO EX PARTE APPLICATION ($23) AND PER DIEM DAMAGES ($180) AS UNOPPOSED. GRANT AS TO MESSENGER FEES ($3,716.30). PLAINTIFF FAILED TO DEMONSTRATE NECESSITY OR REASONABLENESS OF FEES. SEE NELSON V. ANDERSON, (1999) 72 CAL.APP.4TH 111, 132. DENY AS TO REST. ALL DEFENDANTS JOINTLY AND SEVERALLY LIABLE FOR COSTS EXCEPT AS TO DEFENDANTS MACKIN AND SOSA. (PB)
